_notes: Import dependency rules for internal modules.
from is a file path and supports * globs.
allow is either an array of allowed internal targets or true.
Imports from node:* are always allowed.
Files matched by requireRulesFor must be covered by at least one rule.

rules.reason: Store layer — can only depend on leaf modules
Store layer — currently imports claudeStore for getState aggregation; dept probe: decouple via aggregator layer
Coordinator — can depend on all stores and leaves
Entry point — can depend on any lib module
Tests — can depend on any lib module
